name: Foil Envelope Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tin foil into a 12" x 16" rectangle.
2. Place green pepper, tomato, and green onion on the lower half of the foil sheet.
3. Sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon basil, salt, and white pepper.
4. Place fish on top of the vegetables.
5. Sprinkle with remaining basil, salt, and white pepper.
6. Top with lemon slices.
7. Fold the upper half of the foil over the fish and vegetables.
8. Double fold the edges of the foil to create a tight 1/2 inch seal.
9. Place the foil envelope on a baking sheet and bake at 450°F for 15 minutes, or until the envelope puffs.
10. To serve, cut an "X" in the top of the envelope and carefully fold the foil back.
